{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321180420A24061878D8A8DF5EF69"}"},"total":257},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7530197967431287577","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"五星好评必须的！1v1男女主挺甜的，一路男主升级打怪，成为宇宙之最强[赞][赞][赞]但是我必须吐槽作者大大：“抬手搓一搓鼻子”这个动作几乎每页都有写，什么毛病，男主这个动作真的很拉垮[笑哭]还有2个小瑕疵，感觉作者大大调皮，故意搞事[探究]一个最后成为了兄弟女人罗月，一个成了兄弟女人姜一鸣，被男主楼腰，虽然男主挺正经，明明当时情节有男的可以代替，避免接触楼腰，作者神力非要来一下，搞得2个女的差点喜欢上男主，要不是我们读者神之吐槽，不知道多少人弃文……保住了一本好文，精彩的仙魔热血 纯单女主[爱心][爱心]给我们读者点赞👍哈哈哈"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753264896,"group_id":"7072537121138936866","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/QH/Ikzetn5stxPtciX+psIHiIZkGDIVuKT3neMXjRd","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d089b3a4e0e241129cd46938c9631f69~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615569&x-signature=j58ebraID6BR4L5OUkENzjtsPWk%3D","user_id":"1530967078478920","user_name":"Lily🌸喜欢1v1类"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1530967078478920","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7072537121138936866","book_info":{"abstract":"山洞中有个少女，她古灵精怪，惹人喜爱。
青月山上有个老道，他道法通玄，为老不尊。
大陆西方有个丹王，他专门练不正经丹药。
…
苍穹之上，是谁在涂墨画江山。
仙路之上，又是谁在执笔写命运？
…
传说仙衍大陆的虚空中，存在着一座巨大的门户！门前有九层台阶，踏上九层台阶站在门前，以身之力叩启此门，踏入其中便可成仙，因而被称之为仙门！
可仙门之后是什么？没人知道！
一个外表木讷，内心带点痞气的少年踏上了仙路。
他本想安稳修行，却不得已陷入仙道之争！
何为修行，修身，正心，问天地！
倘若天地不言又该如何......
仙路之上，有机遇......但更多的是靠自身的努力和坚韧。
少年想叩开仙门，看看门后到底是什么......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o157ef9b6298ce3cbfe6bb7e56675c091~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"圆月悬空","author_id":"","book_id":"7072537121138936866","book_name":"仙路之上","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7072540565950169608","read_count":"423","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"759520"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"307","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o157ef9b6298ce3cbfe6bb7e56675c091~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779271460&x-signature=PYni7%2BV1STW5DgenLmPLfDtNgnw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3998243850822935","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"378"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321180420A24061878D8A8DF5EF69"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"f nt":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5378,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10391,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":13908},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1647692186,"author_reply_time":1647707005,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7098871531057120004","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一口气看完，真的很不错。呆子和长歌给我一种靖哥哥和蓉儿的感觉，一个木讷一个灵动。很有内味了属于是。希望作者加油啊，处女座曝光率比较低，评分的样本也少，不要被评分给影响了，相信只要把质量一直做好肯定没问题的。冲鸭🦆"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1652834980,"group_id":"7072537121138936866","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwN84SCXiPkMsJ/TB5ugPNQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617805&x-signature=tKjbkp0JAbrDpUCor58zq965eto%3D","user_id":"738467840801677","user_name":"爱吃香菇咖喱的伊列"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"738467840801677","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1733507095,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7072537121138936866","book_info":{"abstract":"山洞中有个少女，她古灵精怪，惹人喜爱。
